Description: "Add canvasImportedItems state variable to track items imported explicitly from the vault."
ReplacementContent: "  const [canvasSelectedItem, setCanvasSelectedItem] = useState<VaultContent | null>(null);\n  const [canvasImportedItems, setCanvasImportedItems] = useState<VaultContent[]>([]);\n  const [canvasRatio, setCanvasRatio] = useState<'1:1' | '16:9' | '9:16'>('1:1');"
TargetContent: "  const [canvasSelectedItem, setCanvasSelectedItem] = useState<VaultContent | null>(null);\n  const [canvasRatio, setCanvasRatio] = useState<'1:1' | '16:9' | '9:16'>('1:1');"
